guardrails.name: investigation-first
guardrails.description: Read-only first action when modifying existing code

guardrails.name: anti-spiral
guardrails.description: Prevent fix-on-fix loops and scope creep

guardrails.name: git-safety
guardrails.description: Never silently resolve conflicts or discard changes

guardrails.name: phase-gates
guardrails.description: Report at checkpoints for multi-file changes

guardrails.name: code-discipline
guardrails.description: Surgical edits, 60-line limit, read before edit
